sqlCommands.descr: update TransX set Ledger = 'Z000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF' and Amt1 = Amt3
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG' and Amt1 = Amt2
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Flex1 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, case when Amt1<0 then Amt1 else 0 end as Amt1, case when Amt2<0 then Amt2 else 0 end as Amt2,  case when Amt3<0 then Amt3 else 0 end as Amt3,  '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, substring(GL,1,5) + '00' as GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, -Amt1 as Amt1,-Amt2 as Amt2,  -Amt3 as Amt3,  '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL and ((GL >= '3000000' and GL < '3330000') or GL >= '3640000'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, substring(GL,1,5) + '00' as GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, -Amt1 as Amt1,-Amt2 as Amt2,  -Amt3 as Amt3,  '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL and GL >= '3330000' and GL < '3600000' and substring(GL,6,2) in ('01','02'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2,  round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3,  '99' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY,PTF)

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, case when Amt1>0 then Amt1 else 0 end as Amt1, case when Amt2>0 then Amt2 else 0 end as Amt2,  case when Amt3>0 then Amt3 else 0 end as Amt3,  '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )

Update t set t.YearPeriod = s.fiscal_year + s.period , t.Yr = s.fiscal_year , t.Period = s.period , t.Co = s.co , t.Crcy = s.crcy , t.PC = s.profit_centre , t.CC = s.cost_centre , t.TP = s.trade_ptr , t.BusCat = s.bus_cat , t.Contract = coalesce(s.contract, '') , t.UWYR = s.uwyr , t.TTY = s.trans_type from TransX t join CorpAcct_Apps.dbo.SAP_ledger_data s on t.GL = s.gl and t.Amt1 = s.doc_amt where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (t.Contract is null or t.Contract = '')
update TransX set Flex1 = '3 Other Expense' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-C'

update TransX set Flex1 = '2 Capital Gains - FX' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-B' and TTY >= '990' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '1 Investment Income' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-A' and TTY >= '990'
update TransX set Flex1 = '1 Investment Income' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-A-1' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '2 Capital Gains - FX' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-B-1' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '2 Capital Gains - FX' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-A-2' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '99 not applicable' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is  NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = c.Name from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = '4 FX Hedge' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-B-2'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Amt2 = 0 or Amt3 = 0)

delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((GL like '%00' and not GL in ('3620000','3630000')) or (GL like '11%' and substring(GL,6,2) in ('02','03') and not (GL = '1143701' and Ledger = 'UG')) or (GL >= '3330000' and GL < '3600000' and GL like '%03'))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '11%' and substring(GL,6,2) = '01' and not Ledger = 'UG'
update TransX set Contract = 'YE EQU ROLL' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Contract like '6%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '11%' and substring(GL,6,1) = '9'
update TransX set TTY = '100' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(TTY,'') <> ''
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('1146215','1146216','1146217','1149615','1149616','1149617') and Ledger = 'UG'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt2 = 0
update TransX set Amt1 = round(0-Amt2,2), UWYR = coalesce(UWYR,'') from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set GL = m.Descr, GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on GL = ID inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where Table_ID = 'ElimGLmap3' and KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Co <> '2008'
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,3) + '9901' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '%9900'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, GL, UWYR, Amt1, Flex1) (Select KeyID, Ledger,GL, UWYR, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, 'pass4' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL > '4000000' group by KeyID, Ledger, GL, UWYR)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex1 is NULL or Amt1 = 0)

update TransX set Amt2 = f2.Amt1 from TransX f1 inner join (Select KeyID, Ledger, GL, UWYR, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF') f2 on f1.KeyID = f2.KeyID and f1.GL = f2.GL and f1.UWYR = f2.UWYR and f1.Amt1 = f2.Amt1

update TransX set Amt3 = f2.Amt1 from TransX f1 inner join (Select KeyID, Ledger, GL, UWYR, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG') f2 on f1.KeyID = f2.KeyID and f1.GL = f2.GL and f1.UWYR = f2.UWYR and f1.Amt1 = f2.Amt1
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Co,GL,TP,PC,BusCat,Contract,UWYr,Amt1,Flex3) (Select KeyID,Yr,Co,GL,TP,PC,BusCat,Contract,UWYr,round(SUM(COALESCE(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, 'pass2' as Flex3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Yr,Co,GL,TP,PC,BusCat,Contract,UWYr)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Flex6 = Mapkey from TransX t inner join mapkeyranges m on t.GL >= m.fromGL and t.GL <=m.thruGL where keyID = '[batchID]' and mapkey like 'M1-_-%-%-%' and not mapkey like 'M1-_-%-%-%-%'
update TransX set Flex7 = m.Name from TransX t inner join mapkeys m on t.flex6 = m.mapkey where keyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Co,Flex6,Flex7,GL,GLdesc,TP,PC,BusCat,Contract,UWYr,Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data2',Yr,Co,Flex6,Flex7,GL,GLdesc,TP,PC,BusCat,Contract,UWYr,ROUND(SUM(Amt1),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Yr,Co,Flex6,Flex7,GL,GLdesc,BusCat,TP,PC,Contract,UWYr)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and UWYr < ([Yr]-2)
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Contract,UWYr,Amt1) (select KeyID,'pass2' as Flex1,Contract,UWYr,Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '401__0_' and Flex1 is NULL)
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Contract,UWYr,Amt2) (select KeyID,'pass2' as Flex1,Contract,UWYr,Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4099998' and Flex1 is NULL)
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Contract,UWYr,Amt3) (select KeyID,'pass2' as Flex1,Contract,UWYr,Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '411__0_' and Flex1 is NULL)
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Contract,UWYr,Amt4) (select KeyID,'pass2' as Flex1,Contract,UWYr,Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4199998' and Flex1 is NULL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID,Contract,UWYr,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4) (select KeyID,Contract,UWYr,ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt1,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt2,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt3,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt4,0)),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'pass2' group by KeyID,Contract,UWYr)
update TransX set PC = '1402000317', Contract = '35188', TP = '3030', Co = '2008', BusCat = '21', CC = '', TTY = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = cast(ABS(Amt1) as varchar(255)), Flex2 = cast(ABS(Amt2) as varchar(255)), Flex3 = cast(ABS(Amt3) as varchar(255)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TP = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '3610000'

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, substring(GL,1,5) + '03' as GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, -Amt1 as Amt1,-Amt2 as Amt2,  -Amt3 as Amt3,  '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL and (GL like '11%' or (GL >= '3330000' and GL < '3600000' and substring(GL,6,2) in ('04','05'))))
update TransX set Amt1 = -coalesce(Amt1,0), Amt2 = -coalesce(Amt2,0), Amt3 = -coalesce(Amt3,0) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, '3610000' as GL, Crcy, TP, PC, Contract, TTY, PTF, -Amt1 as Amt1,-Amt2 as Amt2,  -Amt3 as Amt3,  '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL and GL >= '3600000' and GL < '3640000' )
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,5) + '00' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '19%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(PK,0) = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (PK = 99 or (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0))
update TransX set  Flex4 = 'YE Equity Roll '+PC, Flex5 = 'YE Equity Roll '+PC, Flex6 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
